'''Milessa Kand''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|rebel]] sympathizer who lived on [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. A proponent of pacifism and coexistence, she viewed the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] as the greatest threat to her beliefs. Like [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]], Kand chose to help fellow rebels from behind the scenes rather than fight the Empire head on.<ref name="CatCW" />
